prompt: Compare the field condition against the referenced document, tag, drawing, or standard.
scenario: In a T1 work setting, the evaluated element is P-104 Pressure testing within 2.2 Mechanical - Piping & Plumbing. The relevant subcategory is 2.2.1 Process Piping (T1/T2). title: T1 P-104 Document interpretation
